name: Charcoal Chicken (Full)
description: A whole chicken marinated overnight in Aangan's signature spice blend, then charcoal-grilled low and slow until the skin is perfectly crisped and the inside stays juicy.

name: Charcoal Chicken (Half)
description: Half portion of our signature charcoal chicken. Same great smoky flavour — ideal for one hungry diner.

name: Chicken Tikka (6 pcs)
description: Boneless chicken chunks marinated in yoghurt, lemon and aromatic spices, then cooked on skewers over open coals. Served with mint raita.

name: Seekh Kabab (6 pcs)
description: Minced beef and lamb blended with fresh herbs, green chilli and warm spices, hand-formed onto skewers and grilled to a slight char.

name: Boti Kabab (6 pcs)
description: Cubed beef tenderised in papaya paste then marinated in a smoky spice rub. Charcoal-grilled and served with naan and chutney.

name: Mixed BBQ Platter
description: The full Aangan BBQ experience — half chicken, 4 tikka pieces, 4 seekh kababs and 4 boti kababs. Perfect for sharing with friends or family.

name: Tarragon Steak
description: Our signature — a hand-cut beef fillet pan-seared to your liking, finished with a velvety tarragon cream sauce. Served with garlic mashed potatoes and sautéed vegetables.

name: Black Pepper Steak
description: Juicy beef fillet with a bold crushed black pepper and butter sauce. Served with seasoned fries and grilled corn.

name: Mushroom Sauce Steak
description: Tender beef steak draped in a rich, earthy mushroom and cream sauce. A satisfying combination of rustic and refined.

name: Chicken Steak
description: A generous boneless chicken breast, marinated and pan-seared, served with your choice of tarragon or black pepper sauce.

name: Chicken Karahi
description: A robust wok-cooked karahi with fresh tomatoes, green chillies, ginger and our house spice blend. Rich, aromatic and deeply satisfying.

name: Chicken Kadhi
description: Tender chicken pieces simmered in a silky, sour yoghurt-based gravy flavoured with mustard seeds and curry leaves. A true comfort dish.

name: Crispy Fried Chicken
description: Double-battered chicken pieces fried to a golden crunch. Seasoned with a secret spice mix and served with garlic dip and fries.

name: Chicken Handi
description: Slow-cooked in a clay handi with cream, cashew paste and whole spices until the chicken melts into a luxuriously thick gravy.

name: Mutton Karahi
description: Slow-braised mutton in a fiery charcoal-kissed tomato karahi. The hours of cooking make the meat fall-off-the-bone tender.

name: Chicken Chow Mein
description: Wok-tossed egg noodles with shredded chicken, peppers, spring onions and a savoury soy-ginger sauce. Light yet satisfying.

name: Chicken Manchurian
description: Crispy chicken nuggets tossed in a tangy, sweet-and-spicy Manchurian sauce with sautéed peppers and spring onions.

name: Vegetable Spring Rolls (6 pcs)
description: Crispy golden rolls stuffed with stir-fried cabbage, carrots, mushrooms and glass noodles. Served with sweet chilli dipping sauce.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Aromatic basmati rice slow-cooked with spiced chicken, saffron and caramelised onions. Sealed in a dum pot for maximum fragrance. Served with raita and salad.

name: Mutton Biryani
description: Rich, full-bodied biryani with tender mutton on the bone, aged basmati and a fragrant masala built over hours.

name: Chicken Pulao
description: Subtly spiced long-grain rice cooked in a light chicken yakhni broth with whole spices. Delicate and beautifully fragrant.

name: Chicken Corn Soup
description: A velvety, warming broth with shredded chicken and sweet corn, seasoned with white pepper and a drizzle of sesame oil.

name: Hot & Sour Soup
description: A tangy, fiery broth with mushrooms, tofu, bamboo shoots and a silky egg ribbon. A bold, appetite-awakening starter.

name: Fresh Garden Salad
description: Crisp lettuce, cucumber, tomato, onion and olives tossed in a house lemon-herb dressing. Light and refreshing.

name: Gulab Jamun (4 pcs)
description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in rose-scented sugar syrup. Served warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

name: Kheer
description: Slow-simmered rice pudding with whole milk, cardamom, saffron and a garnish of crushed pistachios and dried rose petals.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm dark chocolate fondant with a molten flowing centre. Served with vanilla ice cream and a dusting of cocoa powder.

name: Rooh Afza Lassi
description: Thick, creamy yoghurt blended with Rooh Afza rose syrup and a hint of cardamom. A classic Pakistani refresher.

name: Fresh Lime Soda
description: Sparkling soda with freshly squeezed lime, a pinch of black salt and chaat masala. Sweet or salted on request.

name: Mango Shake
description: Thick milkshake made from real Sindhri mangoes, whole milk and a touch of sugar. Available in season.

name: Mineral Water
description: Chilled still mineral water — Nestle or Kinley.
